content.problemStatement:
You are given two sequences A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč and C1,C2,‚Ä¶,CNC_1, C_2, \ldots, C_NC1‚Äč,C2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,CN‚Äč. For each valid iii, CiC_iCi‚Äč is the colour of AiA_iAi‚Äč.

You should answer QQQ queries. In each query:


You are given two colours xxx and yyy.
Consider the subsequence of AAA which contains only elements AiA_iAi‚Äč such that Ci=xC_i = xCi‚Äč=x or Ci=yC_i = yCi‚Äč=y (in the original order). Let's denote it by BBB.
For each contiguous subsequence of BBB (including empty subsequence), consider the sum of all its elements. Find the maximum of these sums.
constraints: 1‚Č§Ci‚Č§N1 \le C_i \le N1‚Č§Ci‚Äč‚Č§N for each valid iii
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 3‚ąó1053*10^53‚ąó105
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 3‚ąó1053*10^53‚ąó105
Subtasks**Subtask #1 (50 points):** Every color except the color 111 occurs in at most 111 query.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
The third line contains NNN space-separated integers C1,C2,‚Ä¶,CNC_1, C_2, \ldots, C_NC1‚Äč,C2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,CN‚Äč.
QQQ lines follow. Each of these lines contains two space-separated integers xxx and yyy describing a query.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the maximum sum of a contiguous subsequence of BBB.
